uses: Dioctis equisetifolia, also known as Equisetum, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's extracts have also been used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea. Some studies suggest that Equisetum may have anticoagulant properties, which could be beneficial in preventing blood clots.
